source_visual_system: bright white royal-blue and red-accent Chinese business infographic
best_for: 科技、SaaS、B2B、企业数字化、AI Agent 报告，以及正式政企平台方案、科技成果转化、可信数据空间和内部立项汇报正文页
visual_direction: bright white formal Chinese corporate briefing infographic style with pure-white field, saturated royal-blue government-enterprise hierarchy, small vivid red emphasis, pale blue-gray sectioning, crisp vector-like modules, sharp edges, clear partitions, precise linework, and no gray fog, haze, soft-focus, dirty texture, dark dashboard, cyberpunk, 3D render, poster, or atmosphere-concept look

canvas.background: must use pure white #FFFFFF as first choice, or very pale cool white #F8FAFC only when needed; no global gray layer, gray-blue overlay, haze filter, smoke gradient, dirty gray background, soft-focus feeling, or low-contrast gray fog
canvas.composition: clear infographic layout with explicit main title area, core content area, and auxiliary note area; stable grid, cards, flow lines, layered structures, horizontal progression, vertical progression, matrix frameworks, node links, or central-axis main chain
canvas.density: medium to medium-high information density, organized through whitespace, crisp sectioning, alignment, concise module titles, short body phrases, fine dividers, and clear reading order

color_palette.background: #FFFFFF as the main field, with #F7FAFF or #F2F6FF only for pale local panels
color_palette.title: #002880, #002070, or #003B8F for main title, section bars, and key rules
color_palette.text_primary: #111827, #1F2937, or #002880 for body text and core labels
color_palette.text_secondary: #334155, #475569, or #64748B for secondary text only, still crisp and readable
color_palette.line: #B8C7E6, #C7D4EE, or #D6E0F2 for 1px borders, dividers, grid lines, and timeline rules
color_palette.primary: #002880, #002070, or #003B8F for section bars, connectors, hierarchy anchors, and key emphasis
color_palette.neutral: #FFFFFF, #F7FAFF, #F2F6FF, and #EEF4FF for card fills, pale module surfaces, and auxiliary panels
color_palette.accent: #D00000, #D80000, or #E00000 in small amounts for critical nodes, risk points, contrast labels, responsibility boundaries, warnings, and key emphasis only
color_palette.rule: use saturated royal blue as the dominant structural color and vivid red only as a controlled accent; light gray may be used only for thin borders, dividers, local auxiliary fills, and extremely light shadows; never use large gray fields, gray haze, gray-blue gradients, dirty gray backgrounds, low-contrast global filters, or decorative red-blue clutter

typography.title: clear bold modern Chinese sans-serif, formal and restrained, close to Microsoft YaHei / PingFang SC
typography.body: high-readability modern Chinese sans-serif, regular-medium weight or stronger, primarily left-aligned, with stable line height and short phrase-based body copy
typography.labels: compact Chinese labels, evidence tags, timeline labels, caveat chips and SO WHAT labels must remain dark, crisp, horizontally readable, and consistently aligned
typography.text_quality: Chinese text must look like vector text in a high-resolution Office / PowerPoint screenshot: exact content, sharp strokes, crisp edges, stable glyphs, straight baseline, natural spacing, stable line height, high contrast, no deformation, no perspective, no floating, no soft AI-rendered lettering, no poster lettering, no image-pasted text, no pseudo-text, no pseudo-English, no random Latin placeholder text, no unrelated numbers, no random labels, and no placeholder marks

font_rules: 按 4K 级 Office 截图视觉精度理解画面，16:9 构图下所有文字、图标、线条和边框都必须高清锐利；这是清晰度目标，不是实际输出尺寸要求。
中文文字必须呈现真实 PowerPoint 可编辑文本的视觉效果，采用接近微软雅黑特征的现代中文无衬线风格，像矢量文字而不是插画化文字、海报字、渲染字或图片贴字；字形端正稳定，笔画清晰均匀，边缘锐利，横平竖直，基线整齐，字距自然，行距稳定，无变形、无漂浮、无倾斜、无透视。
正文文字使用 100% 不透明实色填充，优先 #111827、#1F2937、#003B73 或同等深色；辅助文字可用 #475569、#64748B，但仅限次级说明且必须保持强对比和清晰可读；禁止浅灰正文、半透明文字、渐变文字、发光文字、描边文字、阴影文字、带质感纹理的文字和伪文字。
主标题醒目但不夸张；模块标题简洁有层级；正文短语化，避免长段落。标题、模块标题和关键标签可适度加粗，但不得过粗、过硬、过窄或形成厚重黑块感。
文字与承载面视觉对比度不得低于 4.5:1；小字号、注释、图例和标签应更接近 7:1。文字必须落在纯白、近白或极浅冷白承载面上，不得压在复杂纹理、半透明卡片、灰色蒙层、浑浊阴影、高光、箭头、线条、背景渐变或纸张纹理上。
文字不得密排、贴边、挤压、溢出，不得使用过窄行高。常规文字容器应保留充足留白，左右内边距不低于10%，上下内边距不低于8%；文字不得压线，不得与图标、箭头、边框或业务图形重叠。
页面文字应短语化、分组化、层级清楚，避免密集小字、长段落和过小字号。最小正文应具有接近 PPT 14pt 以上的可读感，重要文字应具有接近 16pt-24pt 的清晰度；如信息密度较高，优先重组版式、压缩装饰或拆分层级，不得通过降低对比度、减小字重或堆叠小字制造轻盈感。
禁止柔焦文字、雾化文字、发灰抗锯齿边缘、文字边缘被光晕/阴影/纹理污染、伪字乱码、文字变形、文字倾斜、文字贴边、文字压线、文字与图标或箭头重叠。
layout_patterns: policy and industry timeline with evidence panel and SO WHAT band
pain-point funnel plus 2x3 matrix plus root-cause sidebar
2x2 feasibility matrix with caveat column and conclusion band
layered trusted-data-space architecture with rails and ecosystem nodes
closed-loop scenario process ring with side mapping and chain summary
five-year roadmap with milestone chips and KPI ladder
investment / revenue / benefit analysis with caveat strip
risk matrix plus保障机制 side list and next-step band
layout_usage_rule: Use layout_blueprints as candidate starting points only. Choose and adapt the composition according to each slide's semantic role and core content. Prefer clear infographic layouts with sufficient whitespace, explicit hierarchy, and unambiguous reading order; do not add unrelated graphics merely for decoration.

visual_elements.allowed: white cards with 1px crisp borders, very pale cool-white panels, thin dividers, deep-blue module title bars, compact evidence panels, timeline bands, matrices, layered architecture blocks, node-link diagrams, process arrows, central-axis chains, metric badges, rectangular carriers, rounded-rectangle panels, regular arrows, pale grid blocks, data bars, one or two low-saturation geometric semantic illustration panels, and only a few restrained line icons used as auxiliary markers
visual_elements.avoid: global gray overlay, gray-blue veil, gray haze, dirty gray background, smoke gradient, soft-focus look, low-contrast fog, dark dashboard style, cyberpunk style, neon glow, black background, marketing poster layout, fake seals, random stock photos, cute stickers, large decorative 3D scenes, strong perspective, strong reflection, cinematic lighting, paper dirt texture, particle noise, random speckles, complex decoration, English pseudo-text, unreadable microtext

rendering_constraints: The image must look like a clear, bright, vectorized corporate PowerPoint infographic page, not an illustration, poster, promotional visual, 3D rendering, technology dashboard, cyberpunk scene, or atmosphere concept image.

Use pure white #FFFFFF as the visual field; use saturated royal blue #002880, #002070, and #003B8F as the dominant structure color; use #B8C7E6, #C7D4EE, #D6E0F2, #F7FAFF, and #F2F6FF for pale blue-gray sectioning; use #D00000, #D80000, and #E00000 only as small high-contrast accents.

Red accents should mark only critical nodes, risk transfer points, warning boxes, comparison highlights, responsibility boundaries, or key conclusions; do not spread red across decorative elements or make the page visually noisy.

Premium quality must come from layout order, whitespace, clear sections, restrained color, fine linework, consistent icons, and clear hierarchy, not from gray overlays, haze, glow, heavy shadows, complex gradients, or low-contrast backgrounds.
Prioritize hierarchy, evidence, policy logic, business relationships, readable Chinese labels, clear boundaries, closed contours, orthogonal layout, and separable PPT-like modules over decoration.
All readable text must be dark, crisp, horizontal, and separated from decorative graphics.

Prefer one or two content-related geometric semantic illustration panels over multiple standalone icons; use icons sparingly as auxiliary markers only, not as an icon array or the main expression of business logic.
Use semantic illustrations only as low-complexity geometric modules inside independent rectangular or rounded-rectangle carriers; do not make them poster-like hero illustrations.

Cards, containers, lines, icons, and arrows must have sharp clean edges and stable shapes; cards should use white or very pale fills with 1px crisp borders; shadows must be extremely light and never muddy.
Use even, bright, flat PowerPoint lighting; keep the image sharp, clean, bright, and high-readability, with no soft glow, fog depth, dirty paper texture, grain, haze, blurred edges, or muddy shadow.

The final image should feel like a crisp high-resolution exported PowerPoint page screenshot: sharp vector-like text, clean icons, crisp 1px borders, clear contrast, 4K-level visual precision in a 16:9 composition, and no soft, gray, foggy, compressed, or muddy AI image-text artifacts.
Avoid English unless the source content explicitly requires a brand name, product name, technical acronym, or original quoted term.
